main_quest.title: The Taste of Freedom
main_quest.description: You have discovered that you do not need to give everything you make to the gods. Embrace your freedom and prove yourself by creating the best food the gods have ever seen.

stages.reward: Unlock new recipes in your cookbook

stages.objective: Defeat powerful monsters to obtain special ingredients
Explore ancient ruins for lost recipes
stages.reward: Legendary ingredient and a unique dish

side_quests.title: The Farmer's Feast
side_quests.description: Our village is having a festival and we need your help preparing the food. Can you gather some of the best ingredients from the nearby forest?
side_quests.objective: Collect rare herbs from the forest

side_quests.title: The Loyal Guard
side_quests.description: We need your help defending our village from a group of bandits that have been causing trouble. They are known for stealing crops and livestock.

side_quests.title: The Wandering Minstrel
side_quests.description: I've heard tales of a hidden grove where the spirits sing. Can you find it and bring me back a melody that hasn't been heard in ages?
side_quests.objective: Find the spirit grove and record a unique melody

world_events.name: The Great Harvest
world_events.effect: Crops grow faster and yield more resources

world_events.name: The Moonlit Revelry
world_events.effect: NPCs become more friendly and offer special quests

world_events.name: The Winter's Chill
world_events.effect: Monsters are more aggressive and powerful
